name: creoui
description: creoui - Design System for Creo ecosystem

scripts.build: bun run build:web && bun run build:swift && bun run build:rust
scripts.build:web: style-dictionary build --config transforms/config.web.js && bun scripts/build-web-components.mjs && bun run --cwd packages/web build:js
scripts.dev: bun install --silent && bun run --cwd apps/site dev
scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd packages/editor-host build && bun run --cwd packages/icons-web build && bun run --cwd packages/frame build && bun run --cwd packages/vision build && bun run --cwd packages/md-view build
scripts.site:build: bun run build:web && bun run build:packages && bun run --cwd apps/site build
scripts.site:up: bun run site:build && podman compose up -d --build
